name: Salmon En Papillote
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Leek, cut into long matchstick pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, heat 1 teaspoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the carrot, zucchini, leek, and shallots to the pan and sauté until slightly tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the fish and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
5. Using a pastry brush, grease the centers of two 15-inch-long sheets of foil with half a teaspoon of oil each.
6. Place one salmon steak on the center of each sheet.
7. Spoon half of the vegetable mixture and liquid over each steak.
8. Fold the foil over the steaks to enclose them, crimping the edges to seal.
9. Place the foil packets on a baking sheet and bake for 15 to 20 minutes (until the salmon flakes easily when tested with a fork and the vegetables are tender).
10. Carefully remove the salmon and vegetables to a serving plate.
